title: Pan-Seared Fish Bao
description: A delicate and flavorful dish where fish is pan-seared to perfection and served in a soft and fluffy Chinese bao. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: 1. Preheat a pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add vegetable oil and swirl to coat the pan.
3. Season the fish with soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.
4. Add the fish to the pan and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side.
5. Remove the fish from the pan and set aside.
6. Warm the bao in the pan for 1-2 minutes.
7. Assemble the bao by placing a piece of fish in each bao.
8. Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.
9. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
